title: Suicide Commandos
writer: Piet Legay, Javier Tusell, Mino Guerrini
actors: Aldo Ray, Tano Cimarosa, Ugo Fangareggi
plot: World War 2 - a British commando squad is tasked with attacking the "secret" German airfield from which German fighters have been attacking bombers which are trying to stop German tanks from reinforcing the D Day defences.
